title: sorbus astateria
intro: Sorbus astateria, also known as the Kashmir whitebeam, is a deciduous tree species native to the Himalayan Mountains. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its bark, leaves, and fruits, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Sorbus astateria include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to create remedies for digestive issues and skin conditions.
